name: Bratkartoffel Mit Gemuese (Fried Potatoes with Vegetables)
recipeIngredient: 2 medium green peppers, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and fry for 1 minute until softened.
3. Add the potatoes and continue frying until golden brown.
4. Stir in the pickling cucumbers, cabbage, and remaining vegetables.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Sprinkle the chopped spring onions on top before serving.
